title: kb.ingest.tachyonac.completed v1
description: Emitted by kb at the end of `kb ingest tachyonac` (src/ingest/tachyonac.rs:891), after writing 0+ new research-rec vault entries from tachyonac-engine market data. Source: /kb.

entries_created.description: Number of new vault entries written this run.

regime.description: Market-regime label from the upstream tachyonac-engine ingest (e.g. 'elevated_vol'). Free-form string — its defining vocabulary lives upstream, not in kb.

dry_run.description: Whether this was a dry run (no entries actually written).
